childhood.familyBackground: Eldest son of Cho Seok-rae (조석래), former honorary chairman of Hyosung Group. Part of the prominent Hyosung family controlling this major Korean conglomerate.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 효성그룹 전 명예회장 조석래의 장남. 효성그룹 오너 일가.
childhood.education: Graduated from St. Paul High School (Minnesota, USA); Yale University (Political Science major, 1991); Keio University Graduate School of Law (Master's degree, 1996)
childhood.educationKo: 세인트폴 고등학교, 예일대학교 정치학과 졸업(1991), 일본 게이오대학교 법학대학원 석사학위 취득(1996)
childhood.earlyLife: Born January 16, 1968, Cho Hyun-joon received elite international education in the United States and Japan, preparing him for global corporate leadership. He returned to Korea to join Hyosung Group and climbed the ranks through various divisional roles before becoming the company's third-generation chairman in 2017.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1968년 1월 16일 출생한 조현준은 미국과 일본에서 엘리트 교육을 받았습니다. 귀국 후 효성그룹에 입사하여 다양한 사업부를 거쳐 경력을 쌓았으며, 2017년 제3대 회장에 취임했습니다.

careerTimeline.event: Graduated from Yale University with degree in Political Science
Earned Master's degree from Keio University Graduate School of Law in Japan
Appointed as head of Trading PG (사업부장)
Promoted to head of Textile PG and Trading PG (사장)
Appointed head of Textile & IT PG and Strategic Headquarters (사장)
Received Minister's Commendation from Vietnam's Ministry of Planning and Investment for investment contributions
careerTimeline.eventKo: 베트남 기획투자부로부터 투자 공로 인정받아 장관표창 수상

careerTimeline.event: Became third-generation chairman of Hyosung Group (January)
Hyosung Group records record revenues of 21.28 trillion KRW and operating profit of 2.77 trillion KRW
careerTimeline.eventKo: 효성그룹 매출 21조 2,804억 원, 영업이익 2조 7,702억 원 기록 (사상 최대)

careerTimeline.event: Holds 43.99% ownership stake in Hyosung Group; continued expansion into global markets
careerTimeline.eventKo: 효성그룹 지분 43.99% 보유; 글로벌 시장 지속적 확대

failures.description: Inheritance tax burden management: sold 4.9% of Hyosung Heavy Industries stake (approx. 259.5 billion KRW) to raise funds for inheritance tax obligations
failures.descriptionKo: 상속세 부담 관리: 상속세 재원 마련을 위해 효성중공업 지분 4.9%(약 2,595억 원) 매각
failures.lesson: Demonstrates the challenge of maintaining control in family chaebols while managing tax obligations; balancing wealth preservation with succession planning
failures.lessonKo: 재벌 승계 과정에서 상속세 부담과 지배력 유지의 균형을 맞추는 과제를 보여줌

quotes.text: We must overcome crisis through team spirit and build the foundation for Hyosung's centennial
quotes.textKo: 팀 스피리트로 위기를 극복하고 백년효성의 기반을 마련해야 한다
quotes.context: Spoken regarding group strategy and crisis management during his tenure as chairman
quotes.contextKo: 그룹의 위기 극복 및 전략 방향에 대한 회장으로서의 비전

personalTraits.knownFor: Global business acumen; modernization and internationalization of Hyosung Group; strategic decision-making across diverse business segments (textiles, chemicals, heavy industry, IT)
personalTraits.knownForKo: 글로벌 경영 감각; 효성그룹의 현대화 및 국제화; 다양한 사업부(섬유, 화학, 중공업, IT)에 걸친 전략적 의사결정
personalTraits.philanthropy: Social contribution initiatives and community engagement through Hyosung Group's corporate social responsibility programs
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 효성그룹의 기업사회책임 활동을 통한 사회 기여 및 지역사회 참여
